title: Design the assembly pipeline
description: Define the ordered stages from raw inputs through scrub, redact, assemble, and snapshot so preparation is auditable.
body: Steps: 1. Enumerate inputs and classify each as trusted instruction, untrusted data, or context parameter. 2. Define the ordered stages: normalize, scrub, redact PII, assemble from the versioned template, snapshot. 3. Keep instructions and data in separate regions. 4. Make every stage pure and deterministic. 5. Add a snapshot test of the assembled prompt for representative inputs. Rollback point: before changing stage order or the template. Validation: identical inputs yield a byte-identical prompt and untrusted data never lands in the instruction region.
